description: StreamData model. Defines the abstract Archive base, RawArchive (instant measurements), RollupArchive (derived bucketed-aggregation archives), TimeRangeArchive (externally pre-aggregated [from, to) windowed data), and supporting enum/record types. 1.1.0 → 1.2.0 renamed CkArchive → Archive (abstract) + introduced RawArchive; 1.2.0 → 1.3.0 adds TimeRangeArchive (additive, no entity migration needed); 1.3.0 → 1.4.0 adds RollupArchive.BucketAlignment + the BucketAlignment enum so monthly / weekly / yearly rollups are expressible (additive, pre-1.4.0 entities resolve to FixedSize); 1.4.0 → 1.5.0 adds computed columns on CkArchiveColumn (Name + Formula + ResultType + ComputedState) and the CkComputedColumnResultType / CkComputedColumnState enums (additive, pre-1.5.0 columns have null computed fields). Loaded only when StreamData is enabled at the instance level.
